{
  "@context": "https://schema.org",
  "@type": "JobPosting",
  "title": "Fleet Officer (Luxury Transport Company)",
  "description": "Talent Pool Resources International Limited - No.1 Human Resources Business Partnerfor talent acquisition, job placements, business networking and general services. We offer innovative HR Solutions to Small and medium scale business accross Nigeria.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Fleet Officer (Luxury Transport Company)
Job Location:&nbsp;Lagos Mainland, Lagos
Employment Type: Full-time

Role Summary


	The Fleet Officer will manage and maintain the company&rsquo;s fleet, ensuring all vehicles are in excellent working condition.
	The ideal candidate must have strong hands-on mechanical experience, specifically with diesel engines, and be able to handle day-to-day fleet operations efficiently.


Key Responsibilities


	Manage daily fleet operations and vehicle availability
	Carry out routine inspections and ensure vehicles meet quality standards
	Schedule and monitor servicing, maintenance, and repairs
	Diagnose mechanical faults (diesel engines) and coordinate repairs when needed
	Track fuel usage, mileage, and vehicle performance
	Maintain accurate records for servicing, licensing, and compliance
	Ensure all vehicles meet safety and regulatory requirements
	Respond quickly to breakdowns and provide practical solutions


Experience Areas Required:


	Hands-on diesel engine servicing and repairs
	Preventive and corrective maintenance
	Engine diagnostics and fault finding
	Automotive electrical systems (basic)
	Fleet maintenance planning and scheduling
	Workshop coordination and vendor management
	Vehicle inspection and roadworthiness compliance


Requirements


	Proven experience as a Fleet Officer or similar role
	Must be willing to travel occassionally where necessary
	Strong hands-on mechanical experience with diesel engines (essential)
	Ability to troubleshoot and resolve mechanical issues
	Strong organizational and problem-solving skills
	Good communication skills
	Proficiency in Microsoft Office
	Valid driver&rsquo;s license.


What We Offer


	Attractive salary
	Growth opportunities


Method of Application&nbsp;
Interested candidates should send their CV to&nbsp;talentpoolresourcesng@gmail.com&nbsp;using &quot;Fleet officer and location&quot; as subject of the email.",

  "validThrough": "2026-06-07",

  },

      "addressCountry": "NG"

Fleet Officer (Luxury Transport Company) Job at Talent Pool Resources International Limited




        
    

        
        Talent Pool Resources International Limited - No.1 Human Resources Business Partnerfor talent acquisition, job placements, business networking and general services. We offer innovative HR Solutions to Small and medium scale business accross Nigeria.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Fleet Officer (Luxury Transport Company)
Job Location: Lagos Mainland, Lagos
Employment Type: Full-time

Role Summary
     

        



     (adsbygoogle = window.adsbygoogle || []).push({});
    
    




	The Fleet Officer will manage and maintain the company’s fleet, ensuring all vehicles are in excellent working condition.
	The ideal candidate must have strong hands-on mechanical experience, specifically with diesel engines, and be able to handle day-to-day fleet operations efficiently.


Key Responsibilities


	Manage daily fleet operations and vehicle availability
	Carry out routine inspections and ensure vehicles meet quality standards
	Schedule and monitor servicing, maintenance, and repairs
	Diagnose mechanical faults (diesel engines) and coordinate repairs when needed
	Track fuel usage, mileage, and vehicle performance
	Maintain accurate records for servicing, licensing, and compliance
	Ensure all vehicles meet safety and regulatory requirements
	Respond quickly to breakdowns and provide practical solutions


Experience Areas Required:


	Hands-on diesel engine servicing and repairs
	Preventive and corrective maintenance
	Engine diagnostics and fault finding
	Automotive electrical systems (basic)
	Fleet maintenance planning and scheduling
	Workshop coordination and vendor management
	Vehicle inspection and roadworthiness compliance


Requirements


	Proven experience as a Fleet Officer or similar role
	Must be willing to travel occassionally where necessary
	Strong hands-on mechanical experience with diesel engines (essential)
	Ability to troubleshoot and resolve mechanical issues
	Strong organizational and problem-solving skills
	Good communication skills
	Proficiency in Microsoft Office
	Valid driver’s license.


What We Offer


	Attractive salary
	Growth opportunities


Method of Application 
Interested candidates should send their CV to [email protected] using "Fleet officer and location" as subject of the email.    

    

        Click here to Apply

{
  "@context": "https://schema.org",
  "@type": "JobPosting",
  "title": "Executive Assistant to MD",
  "description": "Fort Knox Outsourcing was set up to cater to the growing need of businesses in Nigeria to reap the economic, strategic and operational benefits offered by outsourcing. We act as a &ldquo;Third Party Service Provider&rdquo; that Source, Select, and Second employment ready workforce in line with client specifications to meet their talent needs as quickly as possible!

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Executive Assistant to MD

Job Location:&nbsp;Lagos
Employment Type: Full-time

Key Responsibilities
Executive &amp; Administrative Support:


	Manage complex calendars, schedules, and appointments for the MD / VP.
	Coordinate domestic and international travel arrangements and expense reporting.
	Prepare high-quality reports, presentations, and briefing documents.
	Organise meetings, conferences, and executive engagements.
	Handle correspondence, emails, and communication on behalf of the MD / VP.
	Maintain accurate filing systems (electronic and physical).
	Track tasks, priorities, and follow-ups to ensure timely execution.
	Uphold strict confidentiality in all business matters.


Sales Team Coordination:


	Support coordination between the VP Sales and regional sales teams.
	Track and monitor sales activities using CRM tools (e.g., Salesforce).
	Ensure timely preparation for key sales meetings and presentations.
	Maintain visibility on team schedules, travel plans, and strategic activities.
	Develop templates and communication tools to improve team efficiency.


Marketing &amp; Communication Support:


	Act as the local liaison for marketing initiatives and campaigns
	Manage digital platforms, including internal portals and social media
	Support planning and execution of marketing events and campaigns
	Coordinate internal communications and share business updates regionally
	Assist with customer engagement activities and corporate events


Requirements


	Bachelor&rsquo;s Degree in Business Administration, Management, or related field.
	Minimum of 15 years of experience, preferably within a technology-driven organisation.
	Strong background in administration, coordination, and executive support.
	Proficiency in Microsoft Office Suite and digital tools.
	Experience with CRM platforms (e.g., Salesforce) is an advantage.
	Strong organisational, analytical, and communication skills.
	High level of professionalism and confidentiality.
	Experience in marketing coordination and social media management.
	Additional language skills are a plus.


Salary
N1,000,000 - N1,300,000 Net monthly.

Method of Application&nbsp;
Interested and qualified candidates should submit their CV to:&nbsp;recruitment@fortknoxoutsourcing.com&nbsp;using&nbsp;&ldquo;Executive Assistant &ndash; Lagos&rdquo;&nbsp;as the subject of the mail.",
  "datePosted": "2026-05-06",
  "validThrough": "2026-05-31",
  "employmentType": "Full-Time",
  "hiringOrganization": {
    "@type": "Organization",
    "name": "FORT KNOX OUTSOURCING"
    
  },
  "jobLocation": {
    "@type": "Place",
    "address": {
      "@type": "PostalAddress",

  },

    "@type": "MonetaryAmount",
    "currency": "NGN",
    "value": {
      "@type": "QuantitativeValue",
      "minValue": 900000,
      "maxValue": 1200000,
      "unitText": "MONTH"
    }
  }
}



Executive Assistant to MD Job at Fort Knox Outsourcing




        
    

        
        Fort Knox Outsourcing was set up to cater to the growing need of businesses in Nigeria to reap the economic, strategic and operational benefits offered by outsourcing. We act as a “Third Party Service Provider” that Source, Select, and Second employment ready workforce in line with client specifications to meet their talent needs as quickly as possible!

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Executive Assistant to MD

Job Location: Lagos
Employment Type: Full-time

Key Responsibilities
Executive & Administrative Support:
     

        



     (adsbygoogle = window.adsbygoogle || []).push({});
    
    




	Manage complex calendars, schedules, and appointments for the MD / VP.
	Coordinate domestic and international travel arrangements and expense reporting.
	Prepare high-quality reports, presentations, and briefing documents.
	Organise meetings, conferences, and executive engagements.
	Handle correspondence, emails, and communication on behalf of the MD / VP.
	Maintain accurate filing systems (electronic and physical).
	Track tasks, priorities, and follow-ups to ensure timely execution.
	Uphold strict confidentiality in all business matters.


Sales Team Coordination:


	Support coordination between the VP Sales and regional sales teams.
	Track and monitor sales activities using CRM tools (e.g., Salesforce).
	Ensure timely preparation for key sales meetings and presentations.
	Maintain visibility on team schedules, travel plans, and strategic activities.
	Develop templates and communication tools to improve team efficiency.


Marketing & Communication Support:


	Act as the local liaison for marketing initiatives and campaigns
	Manage digital platforms, including internal portals and social media
	Support planning and execution of marketing events and campaigns
	Coordinate internal communications and share business updates regionally
	Assist with customer engagement activities and corporate events


Requirements


	Bachelor’s Degree in Business Administration, Management, or related field.
	Minimum of 15 years of experience, preferably within a technology-driven organisation.
	Strong background in administration, coordination, and executive support.
	Proficiency in Microsoft Office Suite and digital tools.
	Experience with CRM platforms (e.g., Salesforce) is an advantage.
	Strong organisational, analytical, and communication skills.
	High level of professionalism and confidentiality.
	Experience in marketing coordination and social media management.
	Additional language skills are a plus.


Salary
N1,000,000 - N1,300,000 Net monthly.

Method of Application 
Interested and qualified candidates should submit their CV to: [email protected] using “Executive Assistant – Lagos” as the subject of the mail.    

    

        Click here to Apply

  "description": "Kishalom (Nigeria) Limited, identified as a Nigerian corporate entity, has been involved in federal procurement and contracting, particularly in areas involving regulatory development and professional services. Official records indicate payment for the development of competition and consumer protection regulations.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Secretary

Job Location:&nbsp;Abuja (FCT)
Employment Type: Full-time

Role Summary


	The Secretary serves as the administrative backbone of Kishalom Nigeria Ltd., ensuring the office runs efficiently and communication flows smoothly across departments and with external stakeholders.
	The role combines administrative coordination, record keeping, communication management, and executive support.
	The Secretary is often the first point of contact for clients, partners, and visitors, and therefore plays a key role in maintaining a professional corporate image.


Responsibilities
A successful Secretary at Kishalom Nig Ltd. will demonstrate:
Efficient Office Coordination:


	Meetings, appointments, and travel schedules are well-organized and run on time.
	Office documents, files, and records are accurate, secure, and easy to retrieve.
	Administrative processes run smoothly with minimal supervision.


Strong Communication &amp; Professional Representation:


	Calls, emails, and correspondence are handled promptly and professionally.
	Visitors and clients experience a welcoming and organized environment.
	Internal communication between departments is clear and timely.
	Ability to use computer and knowledge of Microsoft Office suite.


Reliability &amp; Confidentiality:


	Sensitive company information is handled with discretion and integrity.
	Management can rely on the Secretary for dependable administrative support.
	Deadlines are consistently met and tasks are completed accurately.


Proactive Support:


	Anticipates administrative needs and resolves issues before they escalate.
	Identifies opportunities to improve office procedures and efficiency.
	Supports management in decision-making by providing timely information and documentation.


How This Role Fits Into the Organization


	The Secretary plays a central support role that connects management, staff, clients, and external partners.
	Supports Leadership: Provides administrative assistance to executives and managers so they can focus on strategic and revenue-generating activities.
	Enables Operational Efficiency: Ensures documentation, scheduling, and communication systems function effectively across departments.
	Enhances Company Image: As a front-facing role, the Secretary contributes significantly to how clients and partners perceive the organization.
	Facilitates Collaboration: Acts as an information hub that keeps teams aligned and informed.


In Summary:


	This role is critical to the daily operations of Kishalom Nig Ltd.
	A highly organized, professional, and proactive Secretary helps the company maintain efficiency, professionalism, and strong stakeholder relationships.


Method of Application&nbsp;

Secretary Job at Kishalom (Nigeria) Limited




        
    

        
        Kishalom (Nigeria) Limited, identified as a Nigerian corporate entity, has been involved in federal procurement and contracting, particularly in areas involving regulatory development and professional services. Official records indicate payment for the development of competition and consumer protection regulations.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Secretary

Job Location: Abuja (FCT)
Employment Type: Full-time

Role Summary
     

        



     (adsbygoogle = window.adsbygoogle || []).push({});
    
    




	The Secretary serves as the administrative backbone of Kishalom Nigeria Ltd., ensuring the office runs efficiently and communication flows smoothly across departments and with external stakeholders.
	The role combines administrative coordination, record keeping, communication management, and executive support.
	The Secretary is often the first point of contact for clients, partners, and visitors, and therefore plays a key role in maintaining a professional corporate image.


Responsibilities
A successful Secretary at Kishalom Nig Ltd. will demonstrate:
Efficient Office Coordination:


	Meetings, appointments, and travel schedules are well-organized and run on time.
	Office documents, files, and records are accurate, secure, and easy to retrieve.
	Administrative processes run smoothly with minimal supervision.


Strong Communication & Professional Representation:


	Calls, emails, and correspondence are handled promptly and professionally.
	Visitors and clients experience a welcoming and organized environment.
	Internal communication between departments is clear and timely.
	Ability to use computer and knowledge of Microsoft Office suite.


Reliability & Confidentiality:


	Sensitive company information is handled with discretion and integrity.
	Management can rely on the Secretary for dependable administrative support.
	Deadlines are consistently met and tasks are completed accurately.


Proactive Support:


	Anticipates administrative needs and resolves issues before they escalate.
	Identifies opportunities to improve office procedures and efficiency.
	Supports management in decision-making by providing timely information and documentation.


How This Role Fits Into the Organization


	The Secretary plays a central support role that connects management, staff, clients, and external partners.
	Supports Leadership: Provides administrative assistance to executives and managers so they can focus on strategic and revenue-generating activities.
	Enables Operational Efficiency: Ensures documentation, scheduling, and communication systems function effectively across departments.
	Enhances Company Image: As a front-facing role, the Secretary contributes significantly to how clients and partners perceive the organization.
	Facilitates Collaboration: Acts as an information hub that keeps teams aligned and informed.


In Summary:


	This role is critical to the daily operations of Kishalom Nig Ltd.
	A highly organized, professional, and proactive Secretary helps the company maintain efficiency, professionalism, and strong stakeholder relationships.


Method of Application 
Interested and qualified candidates should send their CV to: [email protected] using the Job Position as the subject of the mail.

  "description": "Sonora Group is a premier financial services firm which provides individuals and businesses with comprehensive financial strategies that maximize growth, protect assets, and optimize investment performance.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Business Development Officer (Female)

Job Location:&nbsp;Ikoyi, Lagos
Employment Type: Full-time

Job Description


	Identify and pursue new business opportunities to increase company revenue.
	Develop and implement strategies to attract new clients and retain existing ones.
	Generate leads through networking, referrals, and market research
	Build and maintain strong relationships with corporate and individual clients.
	Understand client financial needs and recommend suitable financial solutions.
	Ensure high levels of customer satisfaction and service delivery.


Qualifications


	Interested candidates should possess an HND / Bachelor`s Degree with 2 - 3 years experience.


Skill Required:


	Strong sales and negotiation skills
	Excellent communication and interpersonal skills
	Ability to build and maintain professional relationships
	Strong analytical and problem-solving skills
	Good knowledge of financial products and services
	Proficiency in Microsoft Office tools
	Experience in Financial services firm will be an added advantage.


Salary
N250,000 - N300,000 monthly.

Method of Application
Interested and qualified candidates should send their CV to:&nbsp;career.sonora@gmail.com&nbsp;using the Job Position as the subject of the mail.",

Business Development Officer (Female) Job at Sonora Capital and Investment Company




        
    

        
        Sonora Group is a premier financial services firm which provides individuals and businesses with comprehensive financial strategies that maximize growth, protect assets, and optimize investment performance.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Business Development Officer (Female)

Job Location: Ikoyi, Lagos
Employment Type: Full-time

Job Description
     

        



     (adsbygoogle = window.adsbygoogle || []).push({});
    
    




	Identify and pursue new business opportunities to increase company revenue.
	Develop and implement strategies to attract new clients and retain existing ones.
	Generate leads through networking, referrals, and market research
	Build and maintain strong relationships with corporate and individual clients.
	Understand client financial needs and recommend suitable financial solutions.
	Ensure high levels of customer satisfaction and service delivery.


Qualifications


	Interested candidates should possess an HND / Bachelor`s Degree with 2 - 3 years experience.


Skill Required:


	Strong sales and negotiation skills
	Excellent communication and interpersonal skills
	Ability to build and maintain professional relationships
	Strong analytical and problem-solving skills
	Good knowledge of financial products and services
	Proficiency in Microsoft Office tools
	Experience in Financial services firm will be an added advantage.


Salary
N250,000 - N300,000 monthly.

Method of Application
Interested and qualified candidates should send their CV to: [email protected] using the Job Position as the subject of the mail.

{
  "@context": "https://schema.org",
  "@type": "JobPosting",
  "title": "Treasury Officer",
  "description": "Voedsel Capital Limited is a team of young, dynamic and goal-driven individuals, who have a common goal to improve the lives of our clients through access to Finance. Voedsel Capital Limited is focused on improving the productivity of Micro, Small and Medium-scale businesses that have displayed evidence of traction and possess huge growth potential but do not have access to traditional financing solutions.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Treasury Officer
Job Location:&nbsp;Kado, Abuja (FCT)&nbsp;
Employment Type: Full-time
Reports To: Chief Financial Officer

Role Overview


	The Treasury Officer is responsible for managing the company&rsquo;s financial resources, ensuring optimal cash flow, liquidity, and investment efficiency.
	The role involves monitoring daily cash positions, executing financial transactions, managing banking relationships, and supporting financial planning.


Key Responsibilities


	Monitor and manage daily cash flow, ensuring adequate liquidity for operational needs
	Prepare cash flow forecasts and financial projections
	Execute and track payments, transfers, and other treasury transactions
	Manage relationships with banks and other financial institutions
	Ensure timely reconciliation of bank statements and treasury accounts
	Support investment activities, including short-term placements and portfolio tracking

Treasury Officer Job at Voedsel Capital Limited




        
    

        
        Voedsel Capital Limited is a team of young, dynamic and goal-driven individuals, who have a common goal to improve the lives of our clients through access to Finance. Voedsel Capital Limited is focused on improving the productivity of Micro, Small and Medium-scale businesses that have displayed evidence of traction and possess huge growth potential but do not have access to traditional financing solutions.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Treasury Officer
Job Location: Kado, Abuja (FCT) 
Employment Type: Full-time
Reports To: Chief Financial Officer

Role Overview
     

        



     (adsbygoogle = window.adsbygoogle || []).push({});
    
    




	The Treasury Officer is responsible for managing the company’s financial resources, ensuring optimal cash flow, liquidity, and investment efficiency.
	The role involves monitoring daily cash positions, executing financial transactions, managing banking relationships, and supporting financial planning.


Key Responsibilities


	Monitor and manage daily cash flow, ensuring adequate liquidity for operational needs
	Prepare cash flow forecasts and financial projections
	Execute and track payments, transfers, and other treasury transactions
	Manage relationships with banks and other financial institutions
	Ensure timely reconciliation of bank statements and treasury accounts
	Support investment activities, including short-term placements and portfolio tracking
	Monitor loan facilities, repayments, and interest obligations
	Ensure compliance with internal controls, policies, and regulatory requirements
	Prepare treasury reports and provide insights to management
	Identify and mitigate financial risks, including liquidity risks


Requirements


	Bachelor’s Degree in Accounting
	1–3 years of relevant experience in treasury, finance, or banking
	ICAN is an added advantage
	Basic understanding of cash management and banking operations
	Proficiency in Microsoft Excel and financial tools
	Strong analytical skills and attention to detail.


Salary Range
N200,000-N250,000 monthly.

Method of Application 
Interested and qualified candidates should send their applications to: [email protected] using the Job Position as the subject of the mail.
